title: Arbitrary manual live concept linking fall-through
problem: ticket-127 proved live claim extraction for arbitrary manual_text sources. The NM-4 arbitrary manual pipeline still stops after extract-claims; link-concepts requires checksum-pinned mock fixtures for synthnote sources and has no live fall-through for unmapped manual_text.
acceptance_criteria: After live extract-claims on an unmapped manual_text source, explicit live mode can link concepts via Ollama.
At least one validated accepted concept link persists to the gitignored evidence DB.
Checksum-pinned synthnote mock paths remain deterministic.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove live concept-linking fall-through flag; retain ticket-127 extract calibration.
